introSection: Skatteøen (English: Treasure Island) is a steel water roller coaster at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark. It was built by the German company Mack Rides and opened on 7 May 2011.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is a mirror image of the first section on Poseidon at Europa-Park.

fullText:
Skatteøen (English: Treasure Island) is a steel water roller coaster at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark. It was built by the German company Mack Rides and opened on 7 May 2011.

The ride is a mirror image of the first section on Poseidon at Europa-Park.

Blue track and white supports
